sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n55376" key="katatakte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατατακ-τέον</orth>, <sense id="n55376.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must place, class</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τινὰ ἔν τισι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:2:34" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.34</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
